script.text: 구독 명장면 명대사 스크린 잉글리쉬 타임
에밀리 왓슨, 제이슨 아이삭스 목소리 주연의
Are you having a spectacular morning?
Not that spectacular, but very energetic
이렇게 아침부터 에너지를 뿜뿜할 수 있는 사람은 그렇게 흔치 않을 거예요
Are you the one and only lady with lots of energy in the morning?
Yeah, it has a good story and it's not that long
네, 길이가 그렇게 길지 않으면서도 좋은 그런 이야기를 담고 있어서
Easy to watch with the kids
요즘에 이렇게 청취자분들이 글 남겨주시는 거 보니까
It didn't do well at the box office, did it?
It didn't do well at all
In fact, it was a total box office bomb
In the US especially, it did bad
There are not many movies that do that poorly
And in other countries, it made more
So it made a total, worldwide total
Of a bit over, almost 26.5 million dollars
But it still was a commercial failure
전 세계적으로는 한 314억원 정도를 흥행을 했는데
흥행에 실패한 그런 경우가 되는 거죠
세 발의 피도 안 돼요, 맞아요
The more I hear about that guy
if I did his evil bidding
will you turn the wishbones back?
if I did his evil bidding
If I did his evil bidding
and he will release her sometime
why doesn't he let her go now?
